heading: Our Service Offerings
intro: Taxation, accounting, secretarial, management, auditing, hardware wholesale, technical services, and training — all under one roof since 1981.

items.title: Taxation & Accounting
items.desc: Full-scope accounting and tax services — bookkeeping, financial statements, corporate and individual tax filing, SST compliance, e-Invoice readiness, and LHDN liaison.

items.title: Secretarial & Management
items.desc: Company incorporation, SSM annual returns, board resolutions, corporate secretarial compliance, business process consulting, management reporting, and strategic advisory.

items.title: Auditing
items.desc: Independent financial audits and assurance services. Present accurate, credible financials to stakeholders, banks, and regulatory bodies with confidence.

items.title: Computer Hardware & Technical
items.desc: Computer hardware wholesale, IT infrastructure, networking solutions, and on-site technical support for SMEs across Pahang.

items.title: Software Training & Support
items.desc: Authorized AutoCount and FeedMe dealer for Pahang. Full installation, configuration, licensing, training, and ongoing support for AutoCount Accounting, POS, and FeedMe Smart POS.
